programs.title: Homestead Rescue
programs.desc: A young couple struggle to keep their homestead afloat in torrential Texas weather. The Raneys race to save the rain-hit cabin and livestock shelters.

programs.title: The Good Doctor
programs.desc: Now that Shaun has called off the wedding, he is forced to confront Lea about their relationship and determine what he really means to her.

programs.desc: Alison's games may have pushed her friends too far when an innocent man's life is put in the balance, so Spencer comes up with a plan B.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a home that's full of surprises in California. They work to modernize the house to appeal to the modern-day buyer.
